frames.narrationSummary: Initialize the DFS stack with the root node.
Initialize the preorder output list.
The stack still has work, so node 8 will be processed next.
Pop node 8 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 8 and append it to preorder order [8].
Push right child 12 first so left can still be visited next.
Push left child 4; it is now on top, so preorder keeps moving left first.
The stack still has work, so node 4 will be processed next.
Pop node 4 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 4 and append it to preorder order [8, 4].
Push right child 6 first so left can still be visited next.
Push left child 2; it is now on top, so preorder keeps moving left first.
The stack still has work, so node 2 will be processed next.
Pop node 2 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 2 and append it to preorder order [8, 4, 2].
The stack still has work, so node 6 will be processed next.
Pop node 6 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 6 and append it to preorder order [8, 4, 2, 6].
The stack still has work, so node 12 will be processed next.
Pop node 12 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 12 and append it to preorder order [8, 4, 2, 6, 12].
Push left child 10; it is now on top, so preorder keeps moving left first.
The stack still has work, so node 10 will be processed next.
Pop node 10 from the top of the stack.
Visit node 10 and append it to preorder order [8, 4, 2, 6, 12, 10].
Return the completed preorder traversal [8, 4, 2, 6, 12, 10].
